title: Pyrex Rectangular Glass Roasting Dish, Clear, Size: 40 x 27 cm, Glass Rectangular Roaster, Oven Baking Dish, Highly Thermal Resistant: Oven, Microwave & Dishwasher Safe, GD031
features: THERMAL SHOCK RESISTANCE: Withstand rapid temperature changes without risk of shattering or cracking
MULTI-FUNCTIONAL: Microwave, oven, & dishwasher safe for versatile cooking & easy cleaning
BUILT TO LAST: Robust design ensures durability for both commercial & home kitchens
STYLISH OVEN-TO-TABLEWARE: Perfect for serving directly from the oven to the table, adding elegance to both commercial & domestic settings
GENEROUS SIZING: Measuring 270(W) x 400(L)mm, ideal for roasting a variety of dishes
TRANSPARENT GLASS FINISH: Clear material allows you to monitor your cooking & serve with visual appeal
description: Savour the perfect combination of durability and versatility with the Pyrex Rectangular Glass Roaster Dish. This premium quality kitchen staple is meticulously constructed from glass with exceptional thermal shock resistance, permitting it to stand up to rapid temperature fluctuations without a hitch. Whether you're swiftly transitioning from oven to refrigerator or to a hot serving table, this dish is your steadfast companion. With dimensions of 270(W) x 400(L)mm and a weight of 1.8kg, it's suitably sized for a variety of culinary creations. The clear glass material not only offers a view of your dish as it cooks but also adds an elegant touch to any table setting. Designed for convenience, it’s microwave, oven, and dishwasher safe, enabling you to cook, serve, and clean with ease. The Pyrex Roaster Dish is an essential for any kitchen, streamlining your cooking and serving process in both commercial and domestic environments.
